context:
COMPETITIVE PRICING BRIEF — Apr 12, 2026
NYC Observation Deck Market · Source: daily public booking widget monitoring

CURRENT GA PRICES (adult · all-in including fees):
  Empire State Building (ESB): $44 base + $5 flat/txn = $49 solo all-in
    Sunset/Twilight window (timed premium): $56–$62 (+$10–15 upcharge on base rack rate)
  Edge Hudson Yards: $42–$69 fully dynamic; baseline all-in ~$44
    Evening window (3–10 PM): $42–$69 (+$10–20 above morning baseline)
  Summit One Vanderbilt: $44–$68 semi-dynamic (6 discrete price tiers observed)
  Top of the Rock: $47–$71 fully dynamic (17+ distinct price points observed)

FEE STRUCTURE — why group size flips the competitive comparison:
  ESB: $5 flat per transaction (same fee for 1 or 10 tickets)
  Edge: $2 per ticket (scales linearly with group size)
  Summit: $3 per order (flat)
  TOR: fee structure embedded / not separately disclosed
  → Solo buyer:  ESB $49 vs Edge ~$44 (ESB costs $5 more)
  → Group of 4:  ESB $181 vs Edge ~$176 (ESB costs $5 more)
  Takeaway: ESB's flat fee is a group pricing advantage that's not obvious from the rack rate alone.

FULL PRODUCT LADDER:
  Advance purchase discount:  ESB = none | Edge = Advance Saver from $27 (up to −35%, 14+ days out)
  Flexible / open-dated:      ESB from $64 | Edge $74 | Summit = none | TOR = none
  Premium upper deck:         ESB $79 (102nd + 86th combo) | Summit Ascent ~$45 | TOR SKYLIFT +$35 add-on (requires GA admission)
  Skip-the-line / Express:    ESB from $85 | Edge $94 | TOR from $55
  F&B bundle:                 ESB $135 (Starbucks Sunrise) | Edge $63 (GA + Champagne)
  Full VIP / premium:         ESB $175 | Edge $105 | Summit $149 | TOR dynamic
  Annual pass:                ESB = none | Edge $99 (launched Mar 2026) | Summit = none | TOR = none

RECENT MARKET ACTIVITY (last 7 days):
  Empire State Building: no price changes detected
  Edge Hudson Yards: 69 price changes (13 increases, 56 decreases, avg magnitude $3.30)
  Summit One Vanderbilt: no price changes detected
  Top of the Rock: no price changes detected

KEY STRATEGIC GAPS / OPPORTUNITIES:
  1. Advance purchase: Edge's Advance Saver creates demand 14+ days out — ESB has no equivalent
  2. Annual pass: Edge $99 is the only pass in the comp set; ESB breakeven ≈2.3 visits at $44
  3. Sunset pricing: Edge dynamically prices evening slots +$10–20 above morning baseline; ESB's open-air 86th floor sunset experience is uniquely differentiated (Summit has no outdoor deck)
  4. F&B entry point: Edge offers GA + Champagne at $63; ESB's lowest F&B touch is $135 Sunrise
  5. Group pricing: ESB is actually cheaper than Edge for parties of 4+ due to the flat fee structure

DATA SCOPE:
  All data scraped from public booking widgets (same as consumer-facing purchase flow)
  Forward coverage: Edge / TOR ~Dec 31 2026 · Summit ~Oct 31 2026 · ESB ~Sep 30 2026
  No internal booking pace, inventory, or revenue data included

============================================================
COMPETITIVE WEBSITE INTELLIGENCE
Source: public-facing attraction websites · scraped for research purposes

============================================================

# Atop Midtown Manhattan's Tallest Skyscraper
SUMMIT One Vanderbilt blends elements of art, technology, architecture, and thrill to take the concept of New York City “observation deck” to entirely new heights.
Buy Tickets
## Hours
**9:00 AM – 10:30 PM**
Last entry at 9:30 PM
Closed on Tuesdays
## Getting Here
**SUMMIT ENTRANCE IS LOCATED UNDER THE ICONIC VANDERBILT AVENUE.**
Enter through the transit hall in Grand Central Terminal (head west if in main concourse). Alternatively, use the doors next to TD Bank located in One Vanderbilt.
SUMMIT is not accessible through the main lobby of One Vanderbilt.
## Hours
**9:00 AM – 11:00 PM**
Last entry at 9:30 PM
Open All Week Long
## Getting Here
**SUMMIT ENTRANCE IS LOCATED UNDER THE ICONIC VANDERBILT AVENUE.**…

## New York, reinvented daily.
Buy Tickets
## Only Here
There’s something special about every moment you spend at Rockefeller Center. Because these experiences can only happen here. This is the epicenter of everything New York. And it delivers every time.
Explore All about attractions
### Top of the Rock
3 decks, 360 degree views, a city that’s all yours.
Explore about Top of the Rock
## Top of the Rock
3 decks, 360 degree views, a city that’s all yours.
Explore
## The Rink at Rockefeller Center
Ice skating on The Rink under the Rockefeller Center Christmas Tree is one of New York’s quintessential winter activities.
Explore
## Rainbow Room
The epitome of New York glamour and elegance. Enjoy private events with the city light as your backdrop.
Explore
## Rockefeller Center Tour
Get a unique look at a place unlike any other. Learn about this historic landmark’s architecture, art and more.
